description: Post-Task Gate enforcement — ensures every agent completes cleanup, memory storage, handoff metadata, and commit at task end
changelog: 1.0.0 — Initial contract: 4-point post-task checklist + handoff.js integration

problem.statement: Sprint 11 (Pre-Flight Gate) enforces the oath at task START. But there is zero enforcement at task END. JengaBooks Code agent proved this in Sprint 13: skipped memory storage, left temp files, no commit, no telemetry.
problem.concreteExample: Sprint 13 subtask: 4 violations detected — no PFG sentinel (start skipped), temp files left, no memory stored, no handoff commit made.
problem.impact: Task artifacts go unrecorded, temp files accumulate, memory stays empty, and handoff chains break.

layers.name: Layer 1 — Post-Task Gate Script
layers.description: A Node.js script run at task completion that validates all 4 checkpoints before allowing handoff.

checkpoints.name: Memory Stored
checkpoints.pass: Memory entry exists for this task+agent combination

checkpoints.name: Temp Files Cleaned
checkpoints.check: Check for temp artifacts: temp-*, *.bak, debug-*, ROO-*, PLAN-* in root + e2e/

checkpoints.name: Handoff Metadata Valid
checkpoints.pass: All required fields present (HANDOFF, ARTIFACTS, CONTRACT, STATUS, MEMORY)

layers.name: Layer 2 — handoff.js Integration
layers.description: Modify handoff.js to call post-task-gate.js check BEFORE executing the handoff. If PTG fails, handoff is BLOCKED.
layers.integrationPoint: handoff.js main() function — before writing to ORCHESTRATION.md
layers.behavior_on_fail: Print PTG failure report and exit 1. Do NOT update ORCHESTRATION.md.

layers.name: Layer 3 — Telemetry Audit
layers.description: Every PTG pass/fail event is logged to telemetry. Handoff commits now include PTG:PASSED field.

workflow.ptgReports: Script runs C1-C4 checks, reports pass/fail for each
workflow.ifAnyFail: Agent must fix failures, re-run PTG, then proceed
workflow.handoffIntegration: handoff.js calls post-task-gate.js check before allowing handoff

qualityGates.name: Cleanup Check
qualityGates.criteria: After deleting temp files → PTG-C2 passes; with temp files present → PTG-C2 fails

qualityGates.name: Handoff Metadata
qualityGates.criteria: Valid commit message → PTG-C3 passes; missing MEMORY field → PTG-C3 fails

qualityGates.name: End-to-End
qualityGates.criteria: Full workflow: complete → store → clean → validate → reset → handoff → all pass

qualityGates.name: handoff.js Integration
qualityGates.criteria: handoff.js calls post-task-gate.js and blocks on failure
